---
title: "Alefiya Hussain"
image: profile.svg
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: rounded
  links:
    - text: Email
      icon: envelope
      url: "mailto:alefiyah@usc.edu"
    - text: Google Scholar
      icon: mortarboard
      url: "https://scholar.google.com/"
    - text: GitHub
      icon: github
      url: "https://github.com/alefiyahussain"
    - text: LinkedIn
      icon: linkedin
      url: "https://www.linkedin.com/"
    - text: CV
      icon: file-earmark-text
      url: "cv.pdf"
comments: false
---

::: {.column-page}

## Bio

I'm a researcher at the [USC Information Sciences Institute (USC-ISI)](https://www.isi.edu)
with more than three decades of experience building and operating cutting-edge
platforms for **networked cybersecurity experimentation**, data sharing, and
reproducible research. I have served as PI or co-PI on multiple DARPA, NSF, and
DHS programs.

I lead or co-lead **[DeterLab](https://deterlab.net)** — for over 19 years the
only public research testbed for cybersecurity, serving 1,000+ researchers across
278 institutions and 46 countries — and the **[Merge](https://mergetb.org)**
control-software ecosystem that powers independent testbeds for DARPA and NSF.
My work spans experimentation infrastructure, measurements and benchmarks,
large-scale data collection for machine learning, and the methodology that makes
networking experiments **repeatable and reproducible**.

I also lead extensive **testing & evaluation (T&E)** for DARPA programs — most
recently partnering with Sandia National Laboratories to evaluate three
technologies in the DARPA SearchLight program, producing an 800+ page final
assessment.

On this site you'll find [my research](research.html),
[publications](publications.html), a [technical blog](blog.html), and
[my CV](cv.pdf).

<p></p>

## Research Focus

**Experimentation Infrastructure** | Testbeds and platforms for networking & cybersecurity research — DeterLab, MergeTB, MAGI, ThirdEye <br>
**Measurements, Metrics & Benchmarks** | Rigorous, reproducible measurement of denial-of-service and defense effectiveness <br>
**Reproducibility & Repeatability** | Methodology and fidelity studies for trustworthy networking experiments <br>
**Cyber-Physical Systems** | Statistical modeling of interconnected techno-economic-social systems (e.g. smart grids) <br>
**Data for Machine Learning** | Large-scale, representative data-collection efforts to enable ML research

:::
